event.title: FSFE at the 39C3 in Hamburg, Germany

body.p:
It is this time of the year already, the FSFE will be at the 39c3 Together with over 10.000 people and many civil organisations will we shape the 39C3.
Come and join us!
We have a booth in Halle H at the Bits and Bäume Assembly. There you will find information about the FSFE and our current activities. * 27.12.2025 from 16:00 till 16:45: We will also be part of a podcast by c't uplink (https://pretalx.c3voc.de/39c3-sendezentrum/talk/Y99YJ7/) about digital sovereignty on the first day in the Sendezentrum.
*
The FSFE will be there from 27 to 30 December and we are more than happy to say hi to you. So, come and visit us in the Hall H with the Bits & Bäume Habitat.
